title: Pixel Perfection x DEHYDRATION
description: Compatibility pack between Dehydration and Pixel Perfection.
body:
This is a compatibility pack that adapts [Dehydration](https://modrinth.com/mod/dehydration)'s textures into [NovaWostra](https://modrinth.com/user/NovaWostra)'s [Pixel Perfection Legacy](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-legacy) resourcepack. Try my new Texture pack **Pixel Perfection Fidelity**

You can post any **issues, bugs or feedback** you have on my [discord](https://discord.gg/3YzBEMEj). # _Some of the textures depicted belong to my other pack [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui)_ # **MY OTHER PACKS** - [Pixel Perfection Fidelity](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-fidelity) - [Pixel Perfection x THE TWILIGHT FOREST](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-the-twilight-forest) - [Pixel Perfection x AD ASTRA](https://modrinth.com/project/pixel-perfection-x-ad-astra) - [Pixel Perfection x FARMER'S DELIGHT](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixelperfectionxfarmersdelight) - [Pixel Perfection x CONTROLIFY](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pixel-perfection-x-controlify) - [PPL Alternative GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-alternative-gui) - [PPL Hodgepodge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-hodgepodge) - [PPL Compat Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-compatibility-pack) - [PPL Better Grass](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-better-grass) - [PPL Custom Theme for Jade](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ppl-custom-theme-for-jade)
